events.name: A New Journey
events.description: The world stretches before you.

lines: The world stretches before you, vast and unexplored.
Your legs carry you forward. The journey begins.

events.name: Roadside Find
events.description: Something glints in the grass.

kind.description: A small pouch of coins half-buried in the dirt.

events.name: Forest Town
events.description: A bustling town nestled among the trees.

kind.speaker: Town Elder
lines: Welcome to our humble town, traveler!
We've been expecting someone brave enough to explore these lands.
Rest here as long as you need. The road ahead is long.

events.name: Grassland Capital
events.description: A grand town on the open plains.

events.name: Meadow Hamlet
events.description: A peaceful village surrounded by fields.

kind.speaker: Farmer
lines: Oh, a visitor! We don't get many of those.
The harvest has been good this year. Here, take some supplies.
If you're heading north, watch out for the dense forest.

events.name: Crossroads Village
events.description: A village at a major crossroads.

events.name: Woodland Settlement
events.description: A small settlement deep in the forest.

kind.speaker: Woodcutter
lines: The forest is thick here, stranger.
We've heard strange sounds from the caves to the west.
Be careful out there.

events.name: Highland Outpost
events.description: A fortified village on the grassland edge.

kind.speaker: Guard Captain
lines: Halt! State your business.
...A traveler? Very well. The ruins to the west are dangerous.
We've lost good soldiers to whatever lurks there.

events.name: Mountain Refuge
events.description: A hardy village clinging to the mountainside.

kind.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines: You've come far to reach us up here.
The dungeon below the mountain... it calls to the brave.
Take this warm cloak. You'll need it.

outcomes.text: Mountain Refuge: +40 gold, received Warm Cloak

events.name: Swamp Crossing
events.description: A village built on stilts above the murky water.

kind.speaker: Swamp Witch
lines: Hehehehe... lost in my swamp, are we?
I see darkness in your future... and treasure.
Take this charm. It will protect you from the bog.

outcomes.text: Swamp Crossing: +35 gold, received Bog Charm

events.name: Overgrown Ruins
events.description: Ancient stone walls peek through dense vegetation.

kind.speaker: Weathered Inscription
lines: The stones whisper of an ancient civilization.
They built great things here, before the forest reclaimed it.
Something valuable still lies buried beneath.

events.name: Crumbling Fortress
events.description: The remains of a once-mighty fortress.

kind.speaker: Ghost of a Knight
lines: You can see me? Few living souls can.
This fortress fell to treachery, not battle.
Find the dungeon to the east. Avenge us.

outcomes.text: The Ghost Knight grants you 100 gold!

events.name: The Dark Descent
events.description: A gaping hole in the earth leads downward.

kind.speaker: Warning Sign
lines: DANGER: Ancient dungeon ahead.
Strange sounds echo from below.
Only the prepared should enter.

events.name: The Forgotten Crypt
events.description: A stone entrance sealed with ancient runes.

kind.speaker: Rune Stone
lines: The runes glow faintly as you approach.
This crypt has been sealed for centuries.
Great power — and great danger — lies within.

events.name: Hidden Grotto
events.description: A small cave hidden behind a waterfall.

kind.description: Inside the grotto, you find a chest filled with ancient coins.

events.name: Bear's Den
events.description: A dark cave with scratch marks on the walls.

kind.description: A massive bear guards its territory!

events.name: Hermit's Hut
events.description: Smoke rises from a lonely cabin.

kind.speaker: Old Hermit
lines: Ah, a visitor! It's been years since anyone came this way.
I have knowledge of these lands. Let me share what I know.
The tower to the south holds a great secret.

events.name: Ranger's Lodge
events.description: A well-maintained cabin in the deep woods.

kind.speaker: Forest Ranger
lines: Welcome, traveler. The forest is treacherous alone.
I've mapped the paths through the densest parts.
Here, take this. It will help you navigate.

outcomes.text: Ranger gives you a Forest Map! +20 gold

events.name: Witch's Cottage
events.description: A crooked cottage surrounded by strange plants.

kind.speaker: Bog Witch
lines: I knew you'd come. The swamp told me.
You seek something... power? Treasure? Both?
I can offer you a potion. For a price, of course.

events.name: Abandoned Farmstead
events.description: A deserted farm with overgrown fields.

kind.description: Among the ruins, you find a stash of supplies left behind.

events.name: Shrine of Light
events.description: An ancient shrine radiating warm energy.

lines: You kneel before the shrine.
A warm light envelops you. Your vision expands.
The shrine reveals the paths ahead.

events.name: Shrine of Winds
events.description: A weathered shrine on a windy hilltop.

lines: The wind howls around the ancient stones.
As you touch the shrine, the wind carries whispers of distant lands.
Your journey is blessed by the winds.

outcomes.text: Shrine of Winds: +50 gold, map revealed!

events.name: The Frozen Spire
events.description: A tall tower encased in ice and snow.

kind.speaker: Frost Wizard
lines: You've made it to my tower. Impressive.
Few mortals survive the journey through the snow.
I have a proposal for you, adventurer...

outcomes.text: The Frost Wizard rewards you! +300 gold

events.name: Bandit Camp
events.description: A rough camp with smoldering fires.

kind.description: A group of bandits surrounds you!

events.name: Mountain Lookout
events.description: An abandoned watchtower camp.

kind.description: The lookout offers a commanding view. You find supplies and a spyglass.

outcomes.text: Mountain Lookout: +55 gold, vast area revealed!

events.name: Wolf Pack
events.description: Yellow eyes gleam between the trees.

kind.description: A pack of hungry wolves emerges from the undergrowth!

events.name: Road Goblin
events.description: A goblin blocks the path!

kind.description: A scrappy goblin jumps out from behind a rock!
